summary: Wrote complete Phase 2 SAD.md (v2.0, ~1175 lines). All 24 FRs mapped in Section 6 (FR-to-Component Mapping) and covered in detailed module design sections. Phase 2 additions: MessengerAdapter/WhatsAppAdapter (FR-14), PromptInjectionDefense L3 (FR-15), PIIMaskingV2 with Luhn (FR-16), EmotionAnalyzer+Tracker (FR-17), DST 7-state FSM (FR-18), HybridKnowledgeV2 four-layer with RRF (FR-19), EscalationManagerV2 with SLA (FR-20), GroundingChecker L5 (FR-21), PrometheusMetrics 8-metric suite (FR-22), incremental schema + ivfflat index (FR-23), EdgeCaseCollector golden dataset (FR-24). Section 10 SAB block includes all 24 FRs across 10 layers with full phase2_thresholds and 20 key decisions.
